text: Upon entering this space, I am greeted by a sense of anticipation—the glass doors symbolize a threshold, a liminal space between the ordinary hallway and the unknown depths of inquiry beyond. Stepping inside, vibrant colors and words invite me to contemplate the relationship between research and development, between human curiosity and technological innovation. I feel intrigued and quietly exhilarated, as if I have crossed over into a modern temple of knowledge and creativity. The presence of books and screens together echoes the blending of tradition and progress, evoking a sense of reverence for both past wisdom and future possibility.
